summary: A project named Dollars.ai is being developed, currently working on icon design with 'Dollars 💵' text display.

existing_features.title: In Footer.tsx, locate the anchor element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/footer[1]/div[3]/div[2]/p[2]/a[1] and update its visible text content to 'Dollars.ai'.
